programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old boy comes home to find his mother dead in a pool of blood. After learning that she may have had a stalker, police begin searching widely for the mystery man, only to discover that her killer is someone very close to home.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Eric Honea
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in his truck in Northwest Atlanta, and Quinn and Vince are on the case. But when one eyewitness contradicts another, the detectives will have to sift through fact and fiction to bring this killer to justice.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Lacharity Gaines
programme.desc: When a detective in New York calls Atlanta Police about a case, Quinn and Vince take the call. In doing so, the detectives reopen a cold case about a woman found dead in her apartment. To catch this killer, they'll need to take a trip to New York.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Three’s A Crowd
programme.desc: After a woman miraculously survives 17 gunshot wounds, Bellwood, Illinois police, aided by witness statements and video surveillance, uncover a triangle of romance, rage and revenge.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Flint, Michigan
programme.desc: The city of Flint, Michigan is plagued by deadly drinking water for nearly four years, as state officials repeatedly deny any problems. The crisis would become one of the most infamous State sanctioned public health disasters in American history.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Out of Luck
programme.desc: A young woman disappears without a trace and evidence suggests she may not be coming back. To find her, investigators will have to root out a dark secret and hope that their killer is finally out of luck.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Backroad Betrayal
programme.desc: When a single mom is killed in a horrific car chase, police believe it could be a tragic case of road rage. As they begin their investigation, however, they uncover a sinister plot devised to hide a scandalous secret and a suspect�s double-life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Bound by Blood
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio is on edge after a spree of random shootings terrorize the city. Police frantically search for clues and uncover evidence that the brutal crimes may be connected to a band of unlikely young killers and a teenage love gone wrong.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - The Wrong Mr. Right
programme.desc: A double-homicide in a California neighborhood leaves investigators tracking a case with more questions than answers. A high-speed car chase leads them to a pretty 17-year-old girl that's willing to do wrong to impress her Mr. Right.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Fanning the Flames
programme.desc: After an 18-year-old woman is gunned down in cold blood, detectives discover a mysterious man has been pitting the shooter and the victm against each other. As detectives investigate, they uncover a story of two young women who played with fire - and both ended up getting burned for their man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Flirting with Danger
programme.desc: A frantic 911 call leads investigators to the scene of a brutal double-homicide, just outside of Atlanta. As police hunt for clues, a run of the mill traffic stop leads them to a surprising suspect: a young woman with a promising future and no criminal record. That�s when they begin to unravel a deadly plot fueled by love, desperation, and the young woman�s desire to take care of her man�.no matter the cost.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Crossing the Line
programme.desc: The murder of a new mother shocks a quiet community, especially when investigators learn that her estranged Army sergeant husband has an airtight alibi. But soon, a twisted love triangle emerges, one in which another young woman will cross the line for her man � no matter the cost.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Unfulfilled Duty
programme.desc: A young woman disappears while pursuing her dream of joining the military and enjoying life with her new boyfriend. Detectives wonder if the pressures of recruitment became too much, until a gruesome discovery changes the entire investigation.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Look of a Killer
programme.desc: When a man is found in the street with a gunshot wound to the head, police think that his lifestyle has finally caught up to him. But as they work, detectives uncover a shocking motive and a sickening betrayal from a woman who supposedly loved him.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Kenny Wimbush
programme.desc: A man is shot in broad daylight, and while eyewitnesses know the killer, they don�t know his real name. Quinn and Vince will need to get an eyewitness to I.D. the killer before they can bring him in, but they still may not have the right guy.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Lawrence Green
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince investigate the death of a man who fell from his third-floor window, and they have a witness to the whole thing. Finding the killers may prove difficult, though, especially when one of them has an alibi.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: After a missing mother is found brutally murdered, all signs point to her on and off again boyfriend. Investigators must uncover whether her death is a random act of violence, or a tragic tale of romantic revenge.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: When beloved Detroit rapper Blade Icewood is shot and paralyzed in 2004, he launches a war of words against his attackers. But the salvo of revenge lyrics only heats up the rivalry, leaving Blade dead in a barrage of bullets just 7-months later.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - A Wolf in Sheep’s Clothing
programme.desc: When a reformed wild child settles down with the man of her dreams it seems as if everything’s perfect– until she’s found murdered. Soon the investigation will uncover a slew of secrets, but the revelation of her killer will shock everyone.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Double Devastation
programme.desc: When a decomposing body is found dumped in a local park, investigators work quickly to retrace the woman’s last steps. But tracking her movements won’t prepare them for the shocking confession that reveals the catalyst behind her murder.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Backroad Betrayal
programme.desc: When a single mom is killed in a horrific car chase, police believe it could be a tragic case of road rage. As they begin their investigation, however, they uncover a sinister plot devised to hide a scandalous secret and a suspect�s double-life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Bound by Blood
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio is on edge after a spree of random shootings terrorize the city. Police frantically search for clues and uncover evidence that the brutal crimes may be connected to a band of unlikely young killers and a teenage love gone wrong.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - The Wrong Mr. Right
programme.desc: A double-homicide in a California neighborhood leaves investigators tracking a case with more questions than answers. A high-speed car chase leads them to a pretty 17-year-old girl that's willing to do wrong to impress her Mr. Right.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Fanning the Flames
programme.desc: After an 18-year-old woman is gunned down in cold blood, detectives discover a mysterious man has been pitting the shooter and the victm against each other. As detectives investigate, they uncover a story of two young women who played with fire - and both ended up getting burned for their man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Flirting with Danger
programme.desc: A frantic 911 call leads investigators to the scene of a brutal double-homicide, just outside of Atlanta. As police hunt for clues, a run of the mill traffic stop leads them to a surprising suspect: a young woman with a promising future and no criminal record. That�s when they begin to unravel a deadly plot fueled by love, desperation, and the young woman�s desire to take care of her man�.no matter the cost.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Crossing the Line
programme.desc: The murder of a new mother shocks a quiet community, especially when investigators learn that her estranged Army sergeant husband has an airtight alibi. But soon, a twisted love triangle emerges, one in which another young woman will cross the line for her man � no matter the cost.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Unfulfilled Duty
programme.desc: A young woman disappears while pursuing her dream of joining the military and enjoying life with her new boyfriend. Detectives wonder if the pressures of recruitment became too much, until a gruesome discovery changes the entire investigation.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Look of a Killer
programme.desc: When a man is found in the street with a gunshot wound to the head, police think that his lifestyle has finally caught up to him. But as they work, detectives uncover a shocking motive and a sickening betrayal from a woman who supposedly loved him.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Kenny Wimbush
programme.desc: A man is shot in broad daylight, and while eyewitnesses know the killer, they don�t know his real name. Quinn and Vince will need to get an eyewitness to I.D. the killer before they can bring him in, but they still may not have the right guy.
